title: Introducing Gemini 3.5 Live Translate
summary: Google introduces Gemini 3.5 Live Translate, a speech-to-speech translation model available via the Gemini API. It supports real-time multilingual translation across 70+ languages with natural-sounding audio and automatic language detection for video dubbing and live conversation translation.
writeup: Google for Developers introduces Gemini 3.5 Live Translate, a speech-to-speech translation model accessible through the Gemini API. It handles real-time translation across more than 70 languages, with natural-sounding audio output and automatic language detection. The video frames two primary applications: video dubbing and live conversation translation. The takeaway is that translation runs speech-to-speech rather than through an intermediate text step, and the capability ships as an API for direct integration.
